title: hieracium lanatum subsp. liottardii
intro: Hieracium lanatum subsp. liottardii is a subspecies of the hairy hawkweed plant, a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium lanatum subsp. liottardii include its potential use in treating digestive issues, skin problems, and wounds, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. Hieracium lanatum subsp. liottardii can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
